capture_notes: Product detail fields mix visible Shopee product-page facts with conservative structured notes for fixture replay.
Logistics dimensions are fixture estimates for margin/shipping replay, not supplier-verified Shopee logistics data.
Avoid unsupported suction, battery, HEPA, wet/dry, or certification claims unless the seller verifies them.

products.title: Portable Mini Desktop Cleaner Desk Vacuum Cleaner Dust Collector for Home Office School Keyboard Cleaning
products.sold_label: not visible in crawled search snippet
products.evidence_label: Detailed competitor seed: SG seller desktop cleaner row with SGD 6.90-11.90 visible price range and 12 variations
products.description: Compact mini desktop cleaner for dry desk crumbs, eraser dust, keyboard gaps, home office, school and stationery use. The crawled page positions it as a small desktop dust collector rather than a full home vacuum.
bullet_points: Compact tabletop format for desk, keyboard and school stationery crumbs
Entry price band leaves room for a low-risk test listing
Use dry crumbs and eraser dust scenarios; do not promise wet cleaning
Visible product page signals include pre-order shipping and 15-day free returns

attributes.Power Source: Battery or USB-powered, supplier confirmation needed
attributes.Use Case: Desk, keyboard, eraser dust and light dry crumbs
attributes.Color: Assorted variants visible; exact SKU to confirm
attributes.Claim Risk: High suction and wet/dry claims require evidence

style_notes: White-background product hero is common and should stay clean
Lifestyle scene should show desk, keyboard, eraser crumbs or light dry dust
Feature image should use factual callouts only, avoiding exaggerated suction effects
